data.title: Home
data.description: The CMS where you describe what you want and get a production-ready site.

sections.headline: AI-native content engine
sections.subline:
Schema-driven content. AI-powered authoring. Static-first output.
Describe what you want and get a production-ready site.
sections.terminalCode:
$ npx @webhouse/cms init
✓ Created cms.config.ts
✓ Schema definitions ready
✓ AI agents configured
✓ Admin dashboard at localhost:3000/admin
→ Ready in 847ms

sections.heading: Everything the AI shouldn't reinvent.
sections.subheading: A complete CMS engine — so your AI agents can focus on content, not infrastructure.
sections.items: [{"title":"AI Agent Orchestration","description":"Provider-agnostic agents for content generation, rewriting, translation, SEO optimization, and design tokens. Swap between Anthropic, OpenAI, or local models.","icon":"⚡","tag":"@webhouse/cms-ai"},{"title":"Schema-Driven Content","description":"JSON Schema powered collections and blocks. Every piece of content is typed, validated, and introspectable — so AI agents can reason about structure.","icon":"◆","tag":"cms.config.ts"},{"title":"Static-First Output","description":"The production artifact is always pre-rendered HTML + CSS + minimal JS. No runtime framework unless you opt in. Incremental builds.","icon":"▲","tag":"npx cms build"},{"title":"Framework Adapters","description":"First-class integration with Next.js (App Router, Server Components, ISR), Astro, and generic Node.js/Express.","icon":"⬡","tag":"Adapters"},{"title":"Media Pipeline","description":"Sharp-based image processing with AI generation, responsive variants, WebP/AVIF conversion, blur hashes, and auto alt-text.","icon":"◉","tag":"@webhouse/cms-media"},{"title":"AI Lock System","description":"Field-level protection enforced at the engine level. AI agents can never unlock fields — only humans can.","icon":"🔒","tag":"AI-LOCK"}]

sections.heading: Define your schema in TypeScript
sections.description: Type-safe collections, fields, and blocks. Your entire content model in one file.

sections.heading: Every site speaks to every AI.
sections.subheading: Two MCP servers — one public for discovery, one authenticated for production. Your content is AI-accessible from day one.
sections.cards: [{"title":"cms-mcp-client","badge":"PUBLIC · READ-ONLY","description":"Bundled with every site. Any AI agent can discover and query published content — no API keys, no documentation needed.","tools":["get_site_summary","list_collection","search_content","get_page","get_schema","export_all"]},{"title":"cms-mcp-server","badge":"AUTHENTICATED · READ+WRITE","description":"Full content production from Claude iOS, Claude.ai, Cursor, or Claude Code. Create, edit, publish, and deploy.","tools":["create_document","update_document","publish","generate_with_ai","rewrite_field","trigger_build"]}]

sections.heading: Describe what you want. Get a production-ready site.
sections.subheading: Then keep iterating with AI or by hand.
